app.name: DomestIQ
app.tagline: Indlela ephephileko nehlakaniphileko yokuxhumanisa abasebenzi nemindeni
search.title: Fumana Abasebenzi
consent.title: Imvumo yobuFihlakeleko
consent.message: Sibuthelela begodu sisebenzise imininingwana yakho yomuntu ngokwe-POPI Act. Ngokuragela phambili, uvuma iindlela zethu zokulondoloza imininingwana.
landing.hero.subtext: Abantu ababulunga amakhaya weSewula Afrika asebenza bafanele ukudlula ukuthembela emezwini womlomo. DomestIQ ixhumanisa abasebenzi namakhaya ngqo — ngeephrofayili eziqinisekisiweko, ukubuyekeza kweqiniso, begodu abasebenzi bagcina yoke imali abayenzako.
landing.problem.waiting_desc: Abasebenzi abanamakghono bahlala ngaphandle kwamasango wama-estate ama-awara, bathembe bona kukhona ozobatlhoga namhlanje.
landing.problem.door_desc: Akukho ID, akukho ukubuyekeza, akukho izirefurensi. Kufanele uthembe bona umuntu nguye athi nguye.
landing.problem.cash_desc: Akukho ubufakazi obutloliweko. Akukho ubufakazi bomsebenzi owenziwe. Uma imali ingakeneli, kuphelile nje.
landing.worker.body: Akusatlhogeki ukuhlala ulinda. Akusatlhogeki ukuthoma phansi njalo uma ulahlekelwa likhasimende. Yenza iphrofayili yakho kanye — ukubuyekeza kwakho, izirefurensi, nedumo lakho kukulandela nanyana ukuphi.
landing.worker.b1_desc: Imisebenzi iza efoununi yakho. Akusatlhogeki ukuhlala emasangweni namkha ukubuza.
landing.worker.b2_desc: Woke umsebenzi omuhle ufumana ukubuyekeza. Koke ukubuyekeza kuletha umsebenzi olandelako. Awusathomi phansi godu.
landing.worker.b3_desc: Amakhasimende nawo aqinisekisiwe. Bona bona uya kubani ungakafiki.
landing.worker.b4_desc: Bhalisa ngefounu yakho kwaphela. Cindezela iinthombe ukhethe amakghono wakho — akukho ukutlola, akukho amaforimu.
landing.worker.b5_desc: Sebenzisa DomestIQ ngesiNdebele, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Afrikaans — zoke iilimi ezili-11 ze-SA.
landing.worker.b6_desc: Asithathi litho emrholweni wakho. Ingasi nje, ingasi nini.
landing.worker.b7_desc: Uyamazi umuntu olungileko? Yabelana ngekhodi yakho. Nabajoyinako, nobabili niyafumana.
landing.worker.b8_desc: Yenza i-CV yobungcweti usuka kuphrofayili yakho. Dawunilowda i-PDF uyisebenzise nanyana kuphi — ngeyakho.
landing.cv.body: Amakghono wakho, umlando womsebenzi, nokubuyekeza kwakho — kutjhentjhwe kwaba yidokhumenti efaneleko ongayinikela nanyana ngubani. Ingasi ye-DomestIQ kwaphela. Ngeyakho.
landing.cv.portable: I-CV yakho isebenza nanyana kuphi. Iyiprinte. Iyithumele nge-imeyili. Iyinikele esangweni.
landing.client.body: Ama-ID aqinisekisiweko. Ukuhlolwa kwemlando. Ukubuyekeza kweqiniso okuvela emakhaya afana nelakho. Lisa ukuthembela kumngane womngane uthome uqatshe ngelwazi leqiniso.
landing.client.b1_desc: Umsebenzi ngamunye angaqinisekisa i-ID ye-SA nokukhululwa kobulelesi. Ubona ibheji ungakabhuga.
landing.client.b2_desc: Izilinganiso ezivela emakhaya wamambala. Izirefurensi ezitloliweko ongazifunda ungakathathi isiqunto.
landing.client.b3_desc: Bona abasebenzi endaweni yakho, bahlelwe ngebanga. Fumana umuntu ohlanu nawe.
landing.client.b4_desc: Kanye namkha njalo. Khetha ilanga, khetha isikhathi, thumela isibawo. Kuphelile.
landing.how.ws1_desc: Cindezela iinthombe ukhethe amakghono wakho. Akukho ukutlola, akukho amaforimu, akukho i-imeyili efunekako.
landing.how.ws2_desc: Iphrofayili yakho, isilinganiso, nokufumaneka kwakho kubonakala nabantu basesha endaweni yakho.
landing.how.ws3_desc: Yamukela namkha ala. Beka iinlinganiso nesitjhejuli sakho. Nguwena olawulako.
landing.how.ws4_desc: Umsebenzi omuhle ufumana ukubuyekeza. Ukubuyekeza kuletha ukubhuga okunengi. Kuyakhula.
landing.how.cs2_desc: Funda ukubuyekeza, bona amabheji wokuqinisekisa, buka umlando womsebenzi.
landing.how.cs3_desc: Thumela isibawo namkha ukhulumisane qangi. Hlelanani imininingwana phakathi kwenu.
landing.how.cs4_desc: Isilinganiso sakho sisize abasebenzi abahle babonwe. Sibulunge umphakathi useqinisweni.
landing.services.subtext: Kusukela kusizo lwansukuzonke kuya emisebenzini yezandla. Abasebenzi babhalisa abakwenzako. Wena ufumana loyo omfunako.
landing.stories.s1_quote: Bengijayele ukulinda amaviki hlangana nemisebenzi. Nje ngifumana ukubhuga qobe veke. Abantwana bami bangakghona ukudla kuhle.
landing.stories.s2_quote: Angikghoni ukufunda kuhle kodwana iinthombe kwenza kube lula. Ngazibhalisa ngedwa. Akukho isizo engilizingeko.
landing.stories.s3_quote: Ngaphambili, benginganabu bufakazi bokobana ngiyakghona emsebenzini wami. Nje ukubuyekeza kwami kukhulumela mina. Amakhasimende ayangithemba ngingakafiki.
landing.stories.s4_quote: Ukufumana umsizi othembekileko bekutjho ukubuza abangani uthembe okuhle. Akusenjalo.
landing.stories.s5_quote: Ngiyazi bona ngubani oza endlini yami. Nawunabantwana, lokho kuqakathekile ukudlula koke.
landing.stories.s6_quote: Ngibeka iinlinganiso zami ngokwami. Akukho umuntu othatha ingcenye. Ngifumene R8,000 ngenyanga edlulileko ngeDomestIQ kwaphela.
landing.cta.body: Woke umsebenzi oyakha iphrofayili uvula ubufakazi bamakghono wakhe. Woke umuzi obhuga ngeDomestIQ wakha ukuthembana esitatimendeni. Sikutjhentjha ngalendlela — ukuxhumana okunye okuqinisekisiweko ngesikhathi.
landing.footer.disclaimer: DomestIQ yiphulathiforimu yokuxhumanisa. Akukho ubudlelwano bomsebenzi obubunjwako hlangana nabasebenzisi.
landing.trust.t3_desc: Khulumisana ngokuphepha kulenkundla — akukho iinomboro zakho ezabelwako
landing.faq.a1: Iye. Abasebenzi bagcina yoke irandi abayifumanako — asithathi ikhomishini. Iphulathiforimu ikhokhwa ngenkokhelo yesevisi encani ekhokhwa ngamakhaya nababhuga.
landing.faq.a2: Nanyana ngiyiphi ifounu ene-inthanethi iyasebenza. DomestIQ isebenza ebhrawuzeni — Android namkha iPhone. Akukho ukudawunilowda okufunekako. Ungaphinda uyifake kusikirini sakho sekhaya njengeephu.
landing.faq.a3: Abasebenzi balayisha i-ID ye-SA nesitifikethi sokungabi nalicala. Ithimba lethu liqinisekisa amadokhumenti linikele ibheji yegolide. Abasebenzi abaqinisekisiweko bafumana ukubhuga okunengi.
landing.faq.a4: Ngokupheleleko. Ihambisana ne-POPIA. Imininingwana yakho i-enkhripthiwe, ayithengiselwa abanye, begodu yabelwa ngemvumo yakho kwaphela.
landing.faq.a5: Joburg, Cape Town, Durban, Pretoria, PE, namadorobha amanengi qobe inyanga. Bhalisa nje ngitjho nangabe indawo yakho ayikabikho — siyandzisa ngokurhaba.
landing.faq.a6: Sesha umsebenzi, hlola iphrofayili nokubuyekeza, ubawa ilanga nesikhathi. Umsebenzi uyamukela namkha uyala. Ungaphinda ukhulumisane naye qangi nihlelane imininingwana.
landing.faq.a7: Iye — wokwenza kanye namkha njalo, kokubili kuyasebenza. Utlhoga ukuhlanza ngomGqibelo namkha umlimi wesimu wamasonto? Nanyana ngiyiphi indlela.
landing.faq.a8: Zoke iilimi ezili-11 ezisemthethweni ze-SA — isiNgisi, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Afrikaans, Sesotho, nezinye. Abasebenzi bangabhalisa begodu bakhulumisane ngelimi labo abalithandako.
landing.cities.subtext: Abasebenzi namakhaya bayaxhumana emadorobheni amakhulu. Amadorobha amanengi qobe inyanga.
landing.cities.not_listed: Awuliboni idorobho lakho? Bhalisa nanyana kunjalo — siyandzisa ngokurhaba.
landing.pwa.title: Faka DomestIQ kuSikirini seKhaya
landing.pwa.desc: Fumana ukufinyelela okurhabako ekubhugeni, emilayezweni, nokunye.
